subject: Nov 22nd, 2025
fact: The session date is recorded as Nov 22nd, 2025.
source_quote: Date: Nov 22nd, 2025

subject: Malkyn Grenefeld
fact: Malkyn Grenefeld was defeated by the party in Hillsfar.
source_quote: victory over Malkyn Grenefeld

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt is a demon lord who constructed a plot thwarted by the party.
source_quote: thwarted the demon lord Graz'zt's carefully constructed plot

subject: Red Plume guards
fact: The Red Plume guards are caught between fractured factions in Hillsfar.
source_quote: Red Plume guards found themselves caught between fractured factions

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana is the head of the Thieves Guild.
source_quote: Isthana, the head of the Thieves Guild

subject: Daein
fact: Daein declined Isthana's offer of a position in Hillsfar's new political order.
source_quote: Daein declined immediately, stating he preferred to keep his head attached to his body

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas received enchanted bracers and superior leather armor from the castle's stores.
source_quote: Akritas receiving enchanted bracers and superior leather armor

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim was outfitted with magical plate mail.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Daein were outfitted with magical plate mail

subject: owlbear
fact: The party commissioned custom armor for their owlbear companion.
source_quote: commissioned custom armor for their owlbear companion

subject: Charles
fact: Charles arrived with urgent news from the Emerald Enclave.
source_quote: Charles arrived with urgent news from the Emerald Enclave

source_quote: Emerald Enclave wishes to speak with the party about a new danger

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is a Drow with silver hair, emerald green eyes, and skin so dark it appeared nearly purple.
source_quote: Murssvayas Dhuurniv, a Drow with silver hair, emerald green eyes, and skin so dark it appeared nearly purple

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is the leader of the Drow outpost of Szith Morcane who fled to the Sporedome.
source_quote: The outpost's leader, Solom Ned'razak, an incredibly powerful wizard, had fled to the fungal forest known as the Sporedome

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is the chief alchemist of Szith Morcane who was captured during the raid.
source_quote: their chief alchemist, Xaven Tanor'this, had been captured during the raid

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a creature who operates an extraplanar brokerage called the Den of the Whispered Word.
source_quote: sold to a creature named Maram il Vass, who operated an extraplanar brokerage called the Den of the Whispered Word

subject: Hillsfar Castle
fact: The castle contains shattered windows and destroyed artifacts.
source_quote: surveyed the shattered windows and destroyed artifacts

subject: Hillsfar Castle
fact: The castle's main gate was spattered with blood from the recent battle.
source_quote: castle's main gate, still spattered with blood from their recent battle

subject: Smithy in Hillsfar
fact: The smithy is described as garishly painted.
source_quote: garishly painted smithy

subject: Silver Shadow Cave
fact: The Silver Shadow Cave is a sacred site for the moon goddess Selûne.
source_quote: sacred cave of Selûne

subject: Silver Shadow Cave
fact: The Silver Shadow Cave contains moats of pollen floating in the air.
source_quote: highlighting moats of pollen floating in the air

subject: Silver Shadow Cave
fact: The Silver Shadow Cave has a wide entrance descending into a broader chamber where moonlight filters below ground.
source_quote: wide cave entrance descended into a broader chamber where natural phenomena caused the moonlight to filter mysteriously below ground

subject: Szith Morcane
fact: Szith Morcane is a Drow outpost in the Underdark that was sacked by an army of slaves.
source_quote: Drow outpost of Szith Morcane had been sacked by an army of slaves

subject: Sporedome
fact: The Sporedome is a fungal forest in the Underdark where survivors of Szith Morcane have gathered.
source_quote: fungal forest known as the Sporedome, where other survivors had gathered

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is a city in the Underdark from which the fiendish fire giants and demons launched their attack.
source_quote: demons from the city of Maerimydra

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The Den of the Whispered Word is an extraplanar brokerage located in the Howling Pits.
source_quote: extraplanar brokerage called the Den of the Whispered Word in the twisted realm known as the Howling Pits

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The Howling Pits is a twisted realm where the Den of the Whispered Word is located.
source_quote: twisted realm known as the Howling Pits
